---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Ezra Seckin"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,
                      fig.align = "center",
                      # Make sure to create the folder
                      fig.path = "../figures/02_AssignASVs")
```

# Prepare Environment
```{r setup}
set.seed(238428)

# set the number of threads
n_threads = 8

# Load packages
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, dada2, patchwork,
               install = FALSE)
```

# Load in QC'd FastQ files
```{r load-fastqs}
filtered_fastqs_path <- "data/01_QualityTrimming/filtered_fastqs"
filtered_fastqs_path

# Forward read vector
filtered_forward_reads <-
  list.files(filtered_fastqs_path, pattern = "R1_filtered.fastq.gz",
           full.names = TRUE)

# Reverse read vector
filtered_reverse_reads <-
  list.files(filtered_fastqs_path, pattern = "R2_filtered.fastq.gz",
             full.names = TRUE)

# Create vector of sample names
sample_names <- sapply(strsplit(basename(filtered_forward_reads), "_"), `[`, 1)
sample_names
```

# Error Model

## Learn errors
```{r learn-errors}
# Forward
error_forward_reads <-
  learnErrors(filtered_forward_reads, multithread = n_threads)

# Reverse
error_reverse_reads <-
  learnErrors(filtered_reverse_reads, multithread = n_threads)
```
